name: Avocado-And-Orange Salad with Citrus Vinaigre
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine orange juice and cayenne pepper.
2. Gradually whisk in olive oil in a thin steady stream until well blended.
3. Season the vinaigrette to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Toss romaine lettuce with 2/3 of the vinaigrette.
5. Divide evenly among 4 salad plates.
6. Arrange cubed avocado, oranges, and onion decoratively on top.
7. Drizzle remaining vinaigrette over the salad.
Per serving: 393 cal, 3.45 g pro, 35.8 g fat, 19.8 carb, 0 mg chol, 148 mg sodium
